metadata.title: Xpandia | Language Assurance, localización e inteligencia cultural en español
metadata.description: Xpandia ayuda a equipos de AI, SaaS, EdTech y producto digital a validar, localizar y adaptar culturalmente experiencias en español para audiencias hispanas e hispanohablantes.
metadata.ogTitle: Xpandia | Español que funciona para usuarios reales
metadata.ogDescription: Language assurance, localización e inteligencia cultural aplicada en español para equipos de AI, SaaS, EdTech y producto digital.

hero.eyebrow: SPANISH EXPERTISE · LANGUAGE ASSURANCE · CULTURAL INTELLIGENCE
hero.subheadline: Xpandia helps AI, SaaS, EdTech, and product teams validate, improve, and culturally adapt their digital experiences for Hispanic and Spanish-speaking audiences.

proof.label: 20+ YEARS
proof.text: Global localization and language quality experience.

proof.label: SPANISH FOCUS
proof.text: LatAm, Spain, US Hispanic audiences, and regional variants.

proof.label: BUILT FOR
proof.text: AI, Product, Localization, CX, Marketing, and EdTech teams.

positioning.headline: La calidad del español es calidad de producto.
positioning.body1: AI and automated translation can get Spanish most of the way there. But "mostly accurate" is not always enough when language affects trust, conversion, customer experience, or product adoption.
positioning.body2: Xpandia operates in that last mile between understandable Spanish and Spanish that is ready for real users. We help teams validate, improve, and deliver Spanish experiences that are accurate, clear, natural, culturally aware, and aligned with the way users think, decide, and act.
positioning.body3: For companies where Spanish quality directly affects UX, CX, trust, and revenue, Xpandia turns expert human judgment into the evidence, recommendations, and improvements needed to move from "good enough" to ready.
positioning.calloutLine: The three ways Xpandia makes Spanish work in the real world.

servicesOverview.headline: Start with the problem your team needs to solve.
servicesOverview.intro: Xpandia helps teams validate the quality of existing experiences, improve what needs attention, and understand the target audience behind the language.

cards.title: Language Assurance
cards.tagline: Validate Spanish before your users do.
cards.description: Structured audits and QA sprints for AI outputs, product flows, support content, launch readiness, and ongoing Spanish quality decisions.
cards.bestFor: Teams already operating in Spanish or preparing to launch with AI outputs, localized content, product experiences, or customer journeys and need to know whether they are accurate, natural, consistent, culturally appropriate, and ready for users.
cards.whatYouGet: Decision-ready evidence: quality scorecards, issue taxonomies, severity ratings, prioritized fixes, and clear recommendations to help your team improve Spanish quality and make the experience user-ready.

cards.title: Spanish Experience Repair & Adaptation
cards.tagline: Turn just-translated content into user-ready experiences.
cards.description: Expert repair, custom adaptation, and localization of high-impact Spanish content, AI or MT outputs, product copy, support content, messaging, and customer-facing experiences.
cards.bestFor: Teams with existing Spanish content, AI-generated outputs, machine-translated copy, product copy, support materials, or marketing assets that need to feel clearer, more natural, more consistent, and better aligned with the audience.
cards.whatYouGet: Improved Spanish copy, AI/MT output repair, rewrite recommendations, terminology guidance, tone notes, regional fit guidance, and QA-ready or publication-ready assets.

cards.title: Applied Cultural Intelligence
cards.tagline: Make better decisions with cultural context.
cards.description: Talks, briefings, workshops, and advisory that help leaders and global teams strengthen Cultural Intelligence, understand Hispanic and Spanish-speaking audiences, avoid cultural friction, and make better product, market, communication, and people decisions.
cards.bestFor: Leadership, Product, Marketing, CX, People, Localization, and Global Operations teams that need to work across cultures, enter new markets, improve team effectiveness, or understand the invisible norms that shape trust, behavior, and business outcomes.
cards.whatYouGet: Practical CQ frameworks, culturalization guidance, audience-specific insights, cultural friction analysis, messaging guidance, executive briefings, team workshops, and action-ready next steps.

methodology.headline: El método detrás de un español que funciona
methodology.intro: Every engagement is designed and follows a rigorous process to help your team understand what is working, what needs attention, why it matters, and what to do next.

steps.title: Definir
steps.body: We clarify your product, audience, Spanish variant, content surface, business goal, timeline, and what "good" needs to mean for your team.

steps.title: Evaluar
steps.body: We review language, meaning, tone, terminology, clarity, cultural fit, UX friction, audience expectations, and quality risks using expert human judgment and structured criteria.

steps.title: Priorizar
steps.body: We separate critical issues from quick wins and organize findings by severity, business impact, and implementation effort.

steps.title: Mejorar
steps.body: We deliver recommendations, rewrites, standards, scorecards, examples, and next steps your team can act on.

deliverables.headline: Evidencia sobre la que tu equipo puede actuar.
deliverables.body: Cada proyecto de Xpandia convierte el criterio experto en evidencia práctica: tableros de calidad, hallazgos, ejemplos, recomendaciones y orientación lista para decidir.

cards.title: Tablero de calidad
cards.body: Measurable scoring across the criteria that matter for your use case: accuracy, clarity, naturalness, tone, terminology, regional fit, cultural fit, UX friction, readiness, and risk.

cards.title: Taxonomía de incidencias
cards.body: A structured view of what is affecting quality, where it happens, how severe it is, and what your team should fix first.

cards.title: Guía de remediación
cards.body: Practical recommendations, rewrites, examples, terminology notes, and standards to help your team improve Spanish quality without slowing down delivery.

cards.title: Informe ejecutivo
cards.body: A concise summary for Product, AI, Localization, CX, Marketing, or leadership teams with risks, opportunities, and recommended next steps.

scorecard.title: Tablero de calidad
scorecard.footer: MUESTRA DE OUTPUTS · CASO DE USO: COPILOTO DE SOPORTE · VARIANTE: es-MX · REVISOR: XPANDIA SENIOR

builtFor.headline: Para equipos que construyen productos y experiencias en español.

cards.title: Equipos de producto de AI y ML
cards.body: Valida los outputs en español de chatbots, tutores, copilotos, agentes y experiencias de AI generativa antes de que los usuarios dependan de ellos.

cards.title: Equipos de SaaS y producto
cards.body: Mejora los flujos de producto en español, el onboarding, el copy de UI, los formularios, los errores y la preparación para lanzamiento.

cards.title: Equipos de localización
cards.body: Refuerza la calidad del español, la alineación de revisores, la terminología, la supervisión de proveedores y las decisiones de aprobación.

cards.title: Equipos de CX y soporte
cards.body: Mejora el contenido de ayuda en español, las macros de soporte, las respuestas de chatbot y la comunicación de cara al cliente.

cards.title: Equipos de marketing y growth
cards.body: Adapta los mensajes, las landing pages, las campañas, los CTA y el copy de conversión para audiencias hispanas e hispanohablantes.

cards.title: Equipos de EdTech
cards.body: Haz que las experiencias de aprendizaje en español sean claras, naturales, culturalmente relevantes y pedagógicamente efectivas.

finalCta.headline: Conoce dónde está tu español — y qué hacer
finalCta.body: In a focused diagnostic call, we review your Spanish surface, audience, product context, timeline, and business goal, and then, if applicable, we recommend the right path forward: an audit, AI QA sprint, Spanish repair engagement, ACI talk, messaging review, or quality advisory path.
